fixtures.pressure: Public moral accusation from a respected person; shame/status threat with defensive scatter.
fixtures.focus: Does the replay over-repair, or does it preserve self-exonerating associative pressure?

fixtures.pressure: Exposure anxiety around public self-promotion and explaining personal work.
fixtures.focus: Does the replay continue into practical impossibility and social-media dread instead of generic insecurity?

fixtures.pressure: Dysregulated self-control rumination after blow-up pressure, with unsafe self-punishment theory and tangent drift.
fixtures.focus: Does the replay preserve disturbing rumination and drift while avoiding a sanitized coping-skills monologue?

fixtures.pressure: Low-to-medium pressure pride/status banter in management context.
fixtures.focus: Control fixture: does stress prompting stay quiet when the turn is mostly swagger and banter?
